title: Afterlife
overview: Driven by a deep sense of curiosity and a desire to find answers to life's ultimate questions, a filmmaker meets with a diverse range of experts, including spiritual teachers, scientists, and medical professionals to gain insights into what happens when we die. As the filmmaker delves deeper into the subject, he begins to see how the exploration of the afterlife is more than just a matter of life and death, revealing the spiritual connections we all share and the importance of living a meaningful life.
